title: fix(shell): startup white flash + readiness-gated splash screen

decisions.decision: visible:false in config + getCurrentWindow().show() in App.tsx first useEffect
decisions.rationale: Simpler than Rust WebviewWindowBuilder approach; window stays hidden until React renders splash (dark), then shows with no white flash

Reads from Zustand store — no prop changes needed to AvatarCanvas, AdkSetupScreen, OnboardingWizard. ADK/onboarding paths signal ready immediately (synchronous render), normal path waits for VRM load or 5s timeout

rejected_alternatives.approach: Rust WebviewWindowBuilder.with_background_color() to set dark bg before WebView2 init
rejected_alternatives.reason: Requires moving window creation from config to Rust code (larger refactor). The visible:false approach achieves same goal with minimal change
